title: Strip transport from image name when looking for local image
body:
When a user pulls an image using a transport, like docker-daemon, we try to lookup
the new image in storage by the input name after the pull.  Because the input name
has a transport (different than local storage), that lookup would fail.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: Looks like tests are blowing up all over the place.
Can we get a test added for this?
I saw this when someone pulled from a docker-daemon.  I dont want to add docker to our CI environment.
